Description: Ensure that KMS keys have automatic key rotation enabled to regularly rotate the cryptographic material.
Risk: Without key rotation, the same cryptographic material is used indefinitely, increasing the risk of key compromise over time. If a key is compromised, all data encrypted with that key version is at risk.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console.
2. Navigate to Key Management Service.
3. Select the key.
4. Click the Rotation tab.
5. Enable rotation and set the rotation period.
6. Click OK.

Recommendation.Text: Enable automatic key rotation for all KMS keys.
